    1. updateConnectionState(boolean, String, String, String, String)

Interface MeterView

All Known Implementing Classes:
MainWindow
public interface MeterView
View interface defining the presentation layer contract for the LCR meter instrument, handling real-time connection telemetry and operational hardware configurations. * @author sylkat

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    updateConnectionState(boolean isConnected, String manufacturer, String model, String firmware, String portName)
    Updates the user interface layout elements to reflect the active serial link status, binding relevant hardware device identification tokens.

  • Method Details

    • updateConnectionState

      void updateConnectionState(boolean isConnected, String manufacturer, String model, String firmware, String portName)
      Updates the user interface layout elements to reflect the active serial link status, binding relevant hardware device identification tokens. * @param isConnected true if the underlying hardware communication pipeline is active
      Parameters:
      manufacturer - the resolved hardware device manufacturer label
      model - the specific LCR meter model variant descriptor
      firmware - the running hardware control firmware version identification string
      portName - the active physical OS port descriptor (e.g., "COM3", "/dev/ttyUSB0")
